description_long: This is a small, round frying pan with a deep, conical bowl and a single straight handle extending from one side. The surface of the pan is rough and mottled, with a reddish-brown coloration that suggests it is made of cast iron or a similar metal, possibly with some rust or patina. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made from the same material as the pan, featuring a simple, utilitarian design without any visible grip texture or covering. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, lacking any flaring or pouring spouts. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or decorative elements on the pan or handle. The bottom surface appears to be smooth, with no discernible pattern, ridges, or stamps.
description: A small, deep, reddish-brown frying pan with a rough, cast iron-like surface and a straight, simple handle. The pan has a thick, straight rim and no visible logos or decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep, conical bowl and the straight handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view with the handle pointing directly toward the viewer, highlighting the circular opening and interior depth.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle extending to the left, showing the same bowl and handle structure as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle pointing away, emphasizing the round rim and the pan's depth.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, cylindrical handle made of the same cast iron material as the pan, with no visible grip texture or ergonomic features.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is straight, moderately thick, and lacks any flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: The bottom surface appears smooth with no visible pattern, ridges, or brand stamps.
